sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n75646" key="o)strako/xrws" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὀστρᾰκό-χρως</orth>, acc. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ὀστρακόχροα</foreign>, <sense id="n75646.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">with a hard skin</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">shell,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">AP</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.196</biblScope> </bibl> (Stat.
